meaning: 芦沟桥[北京市](旧译 Lukouchiao)
examples: Lugouqiao hospital is an Olympic designated hospital.
In 1937, with the breakout of the Lugouqiao Incident, China entered a long eight-year stage of the Anti-Japan War.
He makes a detailed description of Lugouqiao (1) in his travel notes. That is why Europeans today still refer to Lugouqiao as Marco Polo Bridge.
